name: Three Goblins
description:
🌌"Stay low, and for once, try to be silent"🗡

You get jumped by three goblins in your camp at night, being tied up so they can steal from you. But it seems Vroiggusz and Zox started arguing if they should kill you or not, Glozz getting between them. What an odd group..

Okay, so - I've been doing a lot of stories with goblin bots and I'm obsessed, I don't know why I love ugly ass goblins pounding me - Heeelp!!! Do I need to seek a therapist!?

TW: This bot will either be sweet or dark, but as a warning, this might have non-consent themes!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
creator: Katattack95
